summary: Comprehensive frontend testing completed for Tha Dabba premium tiffin website. All major features working correctly including dark theme, navigation, menu tabs, tiffin customizer, subscription plans, calendar widget, delivery map, testimonials, footer, and mobile responsiveness.
critical_code_review_comments: Website is beautifully designed with proper dark luxury theme (Charcoal #121212, Saffron #FF9933, Gold #D4AF37)
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Responsive design works well on mobile (390x844 viewport)
GSAP animations add polish to scroll interactions
Menu tab switching with dynamic content loading works smoothly
context_for_next_testing_agent: All frontend features tested and working. This is a static HTML/CSS/JS website served from Expo's public folder. No backend API calls.

hero_section.details: Dark theme displays correctly, hero title with 'Authentic Indian Home Cooking Delivered Daily', CTA buttons (Build Your Dabba, View Today's Menu) present and clickable, stats show (500+ Happy Families, 15+ Regional Cuisines, 99% On-Time Delivery), hero badge 'Halifax's #1 Premium Tiffin Service' visible

navigation.details: 5 navigation links found (Menu, Build Your Dabba, Plans, Delivery, About), smooth scroll to sections works, navbar gets glass effect on scroll

mobile_menu.details: Mobile menu button visible on mobile viewport, menu opens with slide animation, 5 mobile links present, close button works, menu closes after navigation

menu_tabs.details: All 5 day tabs working (Monday/Punjabi, Tuesday/Gujarati, Wednesday/Rajasthani, Thursday/Bengali, Friday/South Indian), menu content updates dynamically with fade animation, 5 menu cards display in grid layout

tiffin_customizer.details: 3D tiffin visual with rotating animation, tier selection (3 tier/4 tier) works with price update ($12.99/$14.99), food choice buttons work (Dal Makhani, Rajma, Chole, Paneer Butter etc.), Add to Cart button shows success feedback

subscription_plans.details: Daily ($14.99), Weekly ($12.99 - Most Popular), Monthly ($10.99 - Best Value) cards display with features, plan buttons clickable

calendar_widget.details: Calendar shows March 2026, previous/next navigation works, delivery days (orange) and skipped days (red) indicators visible, legend present

delivery_map.details: Interactive map placeholder with Halifax (30 min), Bedford (40 min), Dartmouth (35 min) areas, animated delivery truck, delivery info cards present

testimonials.details: 3 testimonial cards displayed (Sanjay Kumar, Priya Mehta, John Davidson) with 5-star ratings, sources (Google Review, Instagram)

footer.details: Logo, Quick Links, Service Areas, Support sections present, social links (Instagram, Facebook, Twitter) clickable, NS Food Safety Certified and Eco-Friendly Packaging badges visible, copyright 2026
